violations.text: A sponge was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed sponge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
Basins for 3 bay sinks are lacking drain plugs. Drain plugs are required to properly sanitize dishes. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The ceiling tiles in the retail AND back storage areas are in poor repair. Inspector observed broken tiles and previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

The walls in the 3 bay sink area are constructed of wood panels. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (juice) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Basins for 3 bay sinks are lacking drain plugs. Drain plugs are required to properly sanitize dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
Observed missing ceiling tiles in back hallway. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The floors, walls and shelving in the walk-in cooler were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
